title: [TEST COPY] Electrophysiological markers of surprise-induced failures of visual and auditory awareness
description: This dataset contains electrophysiological recordings from 33 participants performing visual and auditory surprise tasks. The study investigates electrophysiological markers associated with surprise-induced failures of awareness across sensory modalities. EEG data were collected during counterbalanced presentation of visual and auditory oddball-like tasks, with detailed event annotations and preprocessing information provided for reproducibility.
methods_description: 33 participants completed both visual and auditory surprise tasks in counterbalanced order. EEG data were recorded using OpenBCI GUI v5.0.1. Note: recorded EEG values are 24 times larger than actual values due to incorrect GUI settings; microvolts are divided by 24 for accurate interpretation.
